message:
feat(core): wire FleetScrollbackCoordinator into runtime maintenance loop with NullPaneScrollbackAccess

Add NullPaneScrollbackAccess no-op implementation for the pre-wiring
phase where real TieredScrollback instances are not yet available.
Returns no panes, no snapshots, and silently ignores eviction requests
so the coordinator's pressure evaluation and telemetry still run.

Integrate FleetScrollbackCoordinator into the runtime health/maintenance
loop (ft-dwjtm): build pressure signals from queue depths each tick,
construct synthetic per-pane info from cursor snapshot data, and run
one coordinator evaluation with NullPaneScrollbackAccess. Log eviction
events at info level and elevated pressure at debug level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
